content: Autonomous curiosity mechanisms inherent to ICM-based curious agents can be framed as a self-organizing pruning and indexing system for state-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agent memory, where intrinsic reward drives the agent to prioritize encoding ambiguous, high-learning-gain memory traces instead of just storing all observed data. This creates a memory architecture that grows with the agent's learning goals rather than being constrained by static capacity limits.
